obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_391_0: \EM* Another..^1. pillar back to the light world?/
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_135_0: \Eb* OPEN UP!^1! ARE YOU CRAZY!^1? HEY...!/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_177_0: \EU* What do we do^1? Hey^1, Kris^1, what do we DO!?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_201_0: \EJ* Should we..^1. should we just break down the door or something!?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_248_0: \EV* If darkness was pouring out^1, everyone would notice.../
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_249_0: \EV* And that just means..^1. more people in danger^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_277_0: \EU* Kris^1, should we just tell somebody!?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_287_0: \Ec* They could catch the Knight^1, and.../%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_313_0: \E2* The hell didn't you say so earlier^1, dumbass!?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_370_0: \E7* Yeah^1, there totally is^1! Up the stairs!/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_391_0: \E1* Probably used the back door^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_413_0: \ED* Were kind of back there earlier^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_440_0: \E1* You didn't..^1. see anyone^1, did you?/%
obj_ch5_DW19A_slash_Step_0_gml_452_0: \E9* Otherwise you woulda said already^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_97_0: \El* Awesome^1, we're back^1! Now we just need to find your.../%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_106_0: \ER* Nah^1, I guess..^1. that's not gonna work now^1, huh?/%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_114_0: \ET* Hey^1, Kris..^1. what's going on with your dad?/
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_115_0: \EU* Why would he kick us out^1? Did he.../%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_167_0: \E3\Vh* You know every Castle has a jail^1, right?/
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_208_0: \ED* Damnit^1. We're stuck in jail again^1, huh.../%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_216_0: \E2* You're an expert at this^1, right^1, Kris^1? Show me what you got./%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_271_0: * (Even moss drinks water^1. Perpetuate the cycle of life?)/%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_331_0: \E5* Hey^1, the hell are you waiting for!?/
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_332_0: \EH* Eating that moss might be our only way out!!/%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_357_0: \E2* Alright^1, that's gotta have helped somehow./%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_368_0: \E2\Vv* You don't think we didn't predict that?/%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_395_0: \EH* Damnit^1, we'll never get out at this rate!/%
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_509_0: \E7* Hey^1, if all three of us get out^1, you win!/
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_554_0: \E2* Hey^1, we can be friends with Aqua^1, too^1! Right^1, Aqua!?/
obj_ch5_DW19B_slash_Step_0_gml_943_0: \E5* Hey^1, Kris^1, why the hell do you have that?/%
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_109_0: ＊ The Dark Fountain is at the top of this somewhere.../%
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0: ＊ You really want to save your father^1, don't you^1, Kris...?/
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_125_0: ＊ ...^1. Is what I'd like to say^1! But.../
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_128_0: ＊ The "family" Asgore "loves" has caused him nothing but misery./
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_129_0: ＊ His love for Toriel..^1. his love for Asriel..^1. his love.../
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_131_0: ＊ In the end^1, it's brought him nothing but despair./
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_132_0: ＊ Despair^1, to his kind and pure heart.../
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_133_0: ＊ But we're going to fix all that./
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_134_0: ＊ This..^1. will be Asgore's perfect world./%
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_142_0: ＊ We will show him a love..^1. stronger than Toriel's./%
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_158_0: ＊ ..^1. Kris^1, if you REALLY care about your father.../
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_160_0: ＊ ..^1. We don't want to see you get hurt either./
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_162_0: ＊ Hey^1, what about how Kris's dad feels!?/
obj_ch5_DW19_old_slash_Step_0_gml_165_0: ＊ Why don't you ask him..^1. yourself?/
